sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root נָכָה) pl. מַכֹּות, more rarely מַכִּים 2Ki 8:29 9:15 .

(1) a smiting, striking, Deu 25:3 2Ch 2:9, חִטִּים מַכֹּות commonly taken to be for חִטֵּי מַכֹּות wheat beaten out, or threshed, but perhaps the reading is corrupted from חִטִּים מַכֹּלֶת 1 Ki. 5:25 . Especially used of plagues, i.e. calamities inflicted by God, Lev 26:21 Deu 28:59, 61 Deu 28:61 29:21 .

(2) a wound, 1Ki 22:35 Isa 1:6.

(3) slaughter in battle, Jos 10:10, 20 Jos 10:20 Jud. 11:33 15:8 or wrought by God, 1Sa 6:19.
